title: Maasia multinervis
taxonomy: Maasia multinervis is classified within the family Annonaceae. This family of flowering plants is commonly known as the custard apple family. The genus Maasia itself is a group of plants that are native to Southeast Asia. Maasia multinervis is a species within this genus. It is a type of evergreen or deciduous shrub or small tree.
